message:
fix(reaper): close plugin dispatch mails in hourly reaper sweep (gt-qfq)

Daemon-dispatched plugin mails (gt:message + from:daemon + title 'Plugin:*')
were never closed after dog completion. They accumulated at ~288/day and only
got caught by AutoClose after 7 days.

Add ClosePluginDispatches() to reaper.go targeting these beads after 1 hour,
matching the existing ClosePluginReceipts fast-track pattern. Wire it into
wisp_reaper.go as Step 3c in the hourly patrol cycle.

Closes #3174

Co-Authored-By: Alex <28374790+A3Ackerman@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
